philosophy.title: The Eyesoul Philosophy
philosophy.body: We believe eyewear is the most intimate accessory. It defines how the world sees you, and how you see the world. Every frame is a testament to our commitment to quality, comfort, and enduring style.

craftsmanship.title: Artisan Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.desc: Precision engineered frames designed to complement your natural features with uncompromising attention to detail.

acetate.title: Custom Acetate
acetate.desc: Sourced from the world's finest mills, our plant-based acetates offer rich, deep colors and incredible durability.

lightweight.title: Lightweight Feel
lightweight.desc: Engineered for all-day comfort. You'll forget you're wearing them.

lenses.title: Premium Optical Lenses
lenses.desc: Anti-reflective, scratch-resistant, and tailored to your exact prescription by our in-house optical lab.

collections.title: Curated Collections
collections.body: Discover eyewear curated by aesthetic, material, and lifestyle. Each collection represents a unique approach to modern optical design.

cta.title: Experience the Difference
cta.body: Visit our showroom for a complimentary consultation and discover your perfect frame with our dedicated opticians.

newsletter.title: Join the list.
newsletter.body: Subscribe to receive updates on new arrivals, exclusive releases, and early access to collaborations.

newsletter.success: Thanks for subscribing! We'll keep you posted on new arrivals and exclusive releases.
